metadata.description: GoT-HCS prompt templates for Graph-of-Thoughts candidate generation (N=4 per thought node).
metadata.reference: Section III-E, Eq. 16 — each prompt emphasises a distinct clinical perspective to promote comprehensive coverage of salient information.
metadata.usage: One prompt is selected per candidate generation pass. All four are cycled across the N=4 candidates produced per thought node per iteration.

P1_problem_identification.description: Focuses the model on identifying the primary clinical problem, presenting diagnosis, and key findings that motivated admission.

P2_temporal_evolution.description: Focuses the model on the chronological progression of clinical events, interventions, and patient status changes over the hospital course.

P3_therapeutic_interventions.description: Focuses the model on medications administered, procedures performed, and clinical management decisions with their rationale and outcomes.

P4_clinical_outcomes.description: Focuses the model on the patient's response to treatment, resolution or persistence of problems, discharge status, and follow-up plan.
